_instructions.description: Template for adding a new use case to llm-eval-toolkit
steps: 2. Replace this file with your actual dataset (minimum 15 examples; 50+ recommended)
4. Run notebooks/eval_analysis.py pointing at your new use case

examples.question: Your question here
examples.reference_answer: What a complete, correct answer looks like. Be specific — this is your ground truth.
known_failure_modes: what the model commonly gets wrong on this question
examples.model_answer: The model's actual response goes here
examples.auto_reasoning: Why the automated judge gave these scores
examples.human_reasoning: Why the human evaluator gave these scores — focus on gaps
examples.disagreement_note: What the auto judge missed that the human caught
